scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production APP_NAME=chat2db-pro DSPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=release webpack --mode production
scripts.build:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_NAME=chat2db-pro-test DSPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=dev webpack --mode development
scripts.build:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=production APP_NAME=chat2db-pro-test DSPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test webpack --mode production
scripts.build:offline: cross-env NODE_ENV=production APP_NAME=chat2db-offline DSPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=release DNETWORK_STATUS=OFFLINE webpack --mode production
scripts.build:offline:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_NAME=chat2db-offline-dev DSPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=dev DNETWORK_STATUS=OFFLINE webpack --mode development
scripts.build:offline:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=production APP_NAME=chat2db-offline-test DSPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test DNETWORK_STATUS=OFFLINE webpack --mode production
